narration: Objects resist changes in motion — that's why seatbelts matter.
visual_description: Hook visual: Objects resist changes in motion — that's why seatbelts matter.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Objects resist changes in motion — that's why seatbelts matter.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Objects resist changes in motion — that's why seatbelts matter.

narration: This resistance is known as inertia, the tendency of objects to keep doing what they're doing.
visual_description: Context visual: This resistance is known as inertia, the tendency of objects to keep doing what they're doing.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This resistance is known as inertia, the tendency of objects to keep doing what they're doing.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This resistance is known as inertia, the tendency of objects to keep doing what they're doing.

narration: When you're in a car and it suddenly stops, your body wants to keep moving. That's why seatbelts save lives.
visual_description: Escalation visual: When you're in a car and it suddenly stops, your body wants to keep moving. That's why seatbelts save lives.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: When you're in a car and it suddenly stops, your body wants to keep moving. That's why seatbelts save lives.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: When you're in a car and it suddenly stops, your body wants to keep moving. That's why seatbelts save lives.

narration: Inertia is everywhere — from riding a bike to playing sports. Don't underestimate its power!
visual_description: Evidence visual: Inertia is everywhere — from riding a bike to playing sports. Don't underestimate its power!

narration: Understanding inertia helps you make safe choices every day, especially on the road.
